ux_issues.description: GET /shared/{invalid-token} returns plain text 'not found' instead of a JSON error object like {"error":"not found"}. This is inconsistent with other endpoints that return JSON. Frontend would need special handling for non-JSON error responses from this endpoint.
ux_issues.suggestion: Return JSON error response like {"error":"not found","code":404} for consistency with other REST endpoints.

ux_issues.description: GET /api/usage without auth returns plain text 'unauthorized' instead of a JSON error object. Same inconsistency as the shared endpoint.
ux_issues.suggestion: Return JSON error responses for all REST endpoints, e.g. {"error":"unauthorized","code":401}.

ux_issues.description: POST /api/trips/share with invalid trip_id returns plain text 'trip not found' (HTTP 404) rather than a JSON error body.
ux_issues.suggestion: Standardize all REST error responses to JSON format.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural REST endpoint test with no AI interaction. All 16 test cases passed. No bugs found. Minor UX issue: error responses from REST endpoints return plain text instead of JSON, which is inconsistent.

GET /api/guides.guides: [{slug, title, persona_name, persona_specialty, destination, country, theme, excerpt, cta_text, cta_url}]
